text.title: perf-test-tools Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for perf-test-tools as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent copies BASE_URL hardcoded to production.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force __ENV.BASE_URL in k6 and fail the script if unset. This prevents accidental load against prod.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without check() + errorRate.add(1), the threshold output reads success even when the SUT is 5xx-ing. check() is mandatory for every response.

failure-mode.description: Agent auto-tunes thresholds based on previous run results.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Convergence on the regressed value — the threshold degrades to match the slow system instead of catching the regression.

failure-mode.description: Thresholds set too tight in CI (p95 < 200ms on staging).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Flakes that erode trust cause teams to relax all thresholds. Set realistic thresholds validated over 3+ runs before adding to CI gate.

failure-mode.description: Combining soak tests (8h, low load) and stress tests (3 min, ramp to break) into one scenario.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents conflate them. Soak finds memory leaks and connection pool exhaustion; stress finds throughput ceiling. Keep them in separate files.

failure-mode.description: LLMs hallucinate k6 modules (k6/http2 doesn't exist).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always run k6 inspect script.js before a real run to catch import errors.

failure-mode.description: Locust agents use requests instead of self.client.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Calls via requests are invisible to Locust's measurement layer and won't be counted.
